ddls:
CREATE TABLE "client_measurements" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "body_fat" REAL /* Percentage of body fat */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the client */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the client */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the client */,
  "adiposity" REAL /* Level of adiposity */,
  "neck" REAL /* Circumference of the neck */,
  "chest" REAL /* Circumference of the chest */,
  "abdomen" REAL /* Circumference of the abdomen */,
  "hip" REAL /* Circumference of the hip */,
  "thigh" REAL /* Circumference of the thigh */,
  "knee" REAL /* Circumference of the knee */,
  "ankle" REAL /* Circumference of the ankle */,
  "biceps" REAL /* Circumference of the biceps */,
  "forearm" REAL /* Circumference of the forearm */,
  "wrist" REAL /* Circumference of the wrist */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurements were taken */,
  "muscle_mass" REAL /* Muscle mass of the client */,
  "bone_density" REAL /* Bone density of the client */,
  "hydration_level" REAL /* Hydration level of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the client */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the client joined the platform */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "fitness_goal" TEXT /* Fitness goal of the client */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any medical conditions of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fitness_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fitness report */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "body_fat_category" TEXT /* Category of body fat percentage */,
  "weight_category" TEXT /* Category of weight */,
  "adiposity_category" TEXT /* Category of adiposity level */,
  "fitness_score" REAL /* Overall fitness score calculated based on the client's measurements */,
  "muscle_mass_category" TEXT /* Category of muscle mass */,
  "bone_density_category" TEXT /* Category of bone density */,
  "hydration_level_category" TEXT /* Category of hydration level */,
  "recommended_next_steps" TEXT /* Specific recommendations for the next steps in the fitness journey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fitness_reports_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dietary_advice" (
  "advice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of dietary advice */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the advice is for */,
  "advice_date" TEXT /* Date when the advice was provided */,
  "caloric_intake" INTEGER /* Recommended daily caloric intake */,
  "macronutrient_ratio" TEXT /* Recommended ratio of macronutrients */,
  "specific_guidelines" TEXT /* Specific dietary guidelines tailored to the client's needs */,
  "hydration_intake" INTEGER /* Recommended daily water intake */,
  "supplement_recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for any supplements that might be beneficial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dietary_advice_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workout_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workout plan */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the plan is for */,
  "plan_date" TEXT /* Date when the plan was created */,
  "workout_days" TEXT /* Days of the week for workouts */,
  "exercise_types" TEXT /* Types of exercises included in the plan */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of each workout */,
  "intensity" TEXT /* Intensity level of the workouts */,
  "rest_days" TEXT /* Days of the week on which the client should rest */,
  "rest_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of rest periods during workouts */,
  "instructor_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the instructor to the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workout_plans_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress_tracking" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurements were taken */,
  "body_fat" REAL /* Body fat percentage at the time of measurement */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight at the time of measurement */,
  "height" REAL /* Height at the time of measurement */,
  "adiposity" REAL /* Level of adiposity at the time of measurement */,
  "muscle_mass" REAL /* Muscle mass at the time of measurement */,
  "bone_density" REAL /* Bone density at the time of measurement */,
  "hydration_level" REAL /* Hydration level at the time of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_tracking_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "data_points" TEXT /* Data points representing the trend */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., individual, group, demographic) */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* A more detailed description of the trend */,
  "trend_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used for the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., client, trainer, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Securely stored password hash */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged into the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "action_result" TEXT /* Result of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id")
)
